final:
// // This is a 4-bit shift register that shifts right on every rising edge of the clock
module shift_register(
	input wire clk,
	input wire reset,
	input wire d,
	output reg [3:0] q
);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
		if (reset) begin
			q <= 4'b0000;
		end else begin
			q <= {q[2:0], d};
		end
	end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This is a 4-bit shift register that shifts right on every rising edge of the clock
